list.name: coin
list.label: Coin
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT coin FROM trigger_orders ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT coin FROM trigger_orders ORDER BY 1

options.content:
## ✅ REAL stop-loss / take-profit orders
These are **actual resting trigger orders of other traders** for `$coin`, polled per-address from the public `frontendOpenOrders` endpoint (Hyperliquid is an on-chain CLOB, so triggers are public). Run `make triggers` to refresh; the more addresses collected (via `make collect`/`make load`), the fuller the picture. Heatmap = number of trigger orders at each price offset from mark, per sweep. _Unlike the 'Modeled Liquidation Heatmap', this is not an estimate — these orders exist._

panels.title: Resting stop/TP triggers — count by bps from mark

yAxis.axisLabel: bps from mark (− below / + above price)

targets.rawSql:
WITH mark AS (
  SELECT last(mark_px, time) AS m FROM assetctx WHERE coin='$coin' AND $__timeFilter(time)
)
SELECT tr.time AS "time",
       (round(((tr.trigger_px/mark.m - 1)*10000)/25.0)*25)::int::text AS metric,
       count(*) AS n_triggers
FROM trigger_orders tr, mark
WHERE tr.coin='$coin' AND $__timeFilter(tr.time) AND tr.trigger_px > 0
  AND abs((tr.trigger_px/mark.m - 1)*10000) <= 1500
GROUP BY tr.time, 2
ORDER BY tr.time

panels.title: Current resting triggers (latest sweep)
panels.description: Real stop-loss / take-profit orders of other traders at the most recent sweep, by price, with distance from mark.

targets.rawSql:
WITH mark AS (
  SELECT last(mark_px, time) AS m FROM assetctx WHERE coin='$coin' AND $__timeFilter(time)
), snap AS (
  SELECT max(time) AS t FROM trigger_orders WHERE coin='$coin' AND $__timeFilter(time)
)
SELECT CASE WHEN tr.order_type LIKE 'Stop%' THEN 'STOP' ELSE 'TP' END AS kind,
       round(tr.trigger_px::numeric, 2) AS trigger_px,
       round(((tr.trigger_px/mark.m - 1)*10000)::numeric, 0) AS bps_from_mark,
       count(*) AS orders,
       round(sum(tr.sz)::numeric, 4) AS total_sz
FROM trigger_orders tr, mark, snap
WHERE tr.coin='$coin' AND tr.time = snap.t AND tr.trigger_px > 0
GROUP BY kind, tr.trigger_px, bps_from_mark
ORDER BY trigger_px DESC
LIMIT 50
